title: Mutuity
subtitle: Turn your local resources into shared value. Discover needs, publish resources, and coordinate across multiple campaigns.
impactLine: Less waste, more cooperation, faster coordination.
loginDialogSubtitle: Connect to access bids, claims, chat, and your account workspace.
featureOneText: Browse community needs and identify where your time, tools, or knowledge can help.
featureTwoText: List reusable goods and services, and route them to the right contributors quickly.
featureThreeText: Manage collaboration in parallel campaigns without mixing responsibilities or visibility.
ctaText: Join your community workspace and begin exchanging resources with clear traceability.
